Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Keith Pepper appeared by zoom for John Tease (petitioner).

Mr. Pepper stated that he has been having a challenge with the Internal Revenue Service to get a refund check of $4,028.00 for the 2021 taxes, that he submitted the request in September of 2022, that it was returned to him in February, that he sent it back, and that he was told by an agent that it was sent to Kansas and that he should hear back in 60 days. Status on close of estate is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mr. Pepper is not ready to file a petition for final distribution, he will need to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
